# New Component or Library Update PR

## Component Information
- **Name**: <!-- e.g., OV2640 CMOS Image Sensor -->
- **Manufacturer/Part Number**: <!-- e.g., OmniVision OV2640-A71A -->
- **Category/Type**: <!-- e.g., active/sensors/cmos_image, Symbol/Footprint/3D Model -->

## Files Added/Modified
<!-- List all files added or changed (symbols, footprints, 3D models, datasheets) -->

## Validation & Testing
- [ ] I have run `python scripts/validate_libraries.py` and all checks pass locally
- [ ] All required fields are present and correct
- [ ] Naming, directory, and datasheet conventions are followed
- [ ] 3D models (if present) are valid and referenced
- [ ] Symbol pins and footprint pads match
- [ ] "Validated" field is set to "No" for new components
- [ ] I have tested the component in a real or test project (if possible)

## Documentation
- [ ] Datasheet is included and referenced
- [ ] Description and keywords are clear and appropriate
- [ ] Any special considerations or limitations are documented

## Screenshots (optional)
<!-- Add screenshots of the symbol, footprint, 3D model, or PCB usage if helpful -->

## Additional Notes
<!-- Add any other relevant info, related issues, or context -->

---
**All contributions must:**
- Be submitted via a pull request (PR)
- Pass all automated validation and CI checks before merging
- Follow the [Contributing Guidelines](docs/CONTRIBUTING.md)

Thank you for your contribution!
